## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Abnormal Security and GrowthX to discuss SEO strategy, content production, and AI initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/Z86bS-rSXuHtboauzemoP5f2YoASGwzy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content migration progressing well; 11 published posts generating 100+ clicks](https://fathom.video/share/Z86bS-rSXuHtboauzemoP5f2YoASGwzy?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Glossary refresh showing positive results; 10 of 20 pages published with more impressions](https://fathom.video/share/Z86bS-rSXuHtboauzemoP5f2YoASGwzy?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [AI SEO tracking in development; dashboard to monitor prompts and LLM mentions coming soon](https://fathom.video/share/Z86bS-rSXuHtboauzemoP5f2YoASGwzy?tab=summary&timestamp=894.0)
  - [Abnormal Security CEO highly interested in AI initiatives; team to showcase GrowthX's AI-driven work](https://fathom.video/share/Z86bS-rSXuHtboauzemoP5f2YoASGwzy?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Performance

  - [Goal to deliver 30 pieces of content this week, including AI glossary pages](https://fathom.video/share/Z86bS-rSXuHtboauzemoP5f2YoASGwzy?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
